---
title: "Rove Miles 买点数监控"
subtitle: "2026-03-03"
date: "2026-03-03"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
---

## 总览

📊 今日监控 **1447** 家商户 **2032** 个产品线

## 倍率返现 (CPP < 2¢)

| 商户 | 产品 | 倍数/里程 | CPP | 描述 | 限制 |
|------|------|-----------|-----|------|------|
| [Easyship](https://www.easyship.com/) | Freemium Subscription | 65.3x | 1.53¢ | 跨境电商物流平台 |  |
| [Namecheap](https://www.namecheap.com/) | Monthly EasyWP, Monthly FastVPN | 65.3x | 1.53¢ | 域名注册 & 网站托管 | 仅新客 |
| [Private Internet Access](https://www.privateinternetaccess.com/) | Monthly Plans | 65.3x | 1.53¢ | VPN 隐私保护 |  |
| [CyberGhost](https://www.cyberghostvpn.com/) | Monthly Plans | 65.3x | 1.53¢ | VPN 隐私保护 |  |
| [Proton](https://proton.me/) | VPN Plus Monthly | 65.3x | 1.53¢ | 加密邮箱 & VPN & 云存储 |  |
| [Manychat](https://www.manychat.com/) | (全部商品) | 65.3x | 1.53¢ | 聊天机器人/自动化营销 |  |
| [WiTopia](https://www.witopia.com/) | Plans with Monthly Payments | 65.3x | 1.53¢ | VPN 隐私保护 |  |
| [Skylum](https://skylum.com/) | Neo Monthly Subscriptions | 55.5x | 1.80¢ | AI 照片编辑软件 (Luminar) |  |
| [Skylum](https://skylum.com/) | Luminar Mobile 1-Month Subscriptions | 52.3x | 1.91¢ | AI 照片编辑软件 (Luminar) |  |


## 固定里程 (CPP < 2¢)

| 商户 | 产品 | 倍数/里程 | CPP | 描述 | 限制 |
|------|------|-----------|-----|------|------|
| [Bluehost](https://www.bluehost.com/) | Enhanced, Premium, Standard, 2× CPU Storage Dedicated Serves | 98,076 | 0.20¢ | WordPress 网站托管 |  |
| [SignNow](https://www.signnow.com/) | signNow API Starter Purchase | 57,692 | 0.52¢ | 电子签名服务 |  |
| [Bluehost](https://www.bluehost.com/) | VPS Web Hosting, VPS Web Serves, VPS cPanels | 32,692 | 0.61¢ | WordPress 网站托管 |  |
| [SignNow](https://www.signnow.com/) | signNow API Purchase | 43,269 | 0.69¢ | 电子签名服务 |  |
| [Network Solutions](https://www.networksolutions.com/) | Website Builder | 9,807 | 0.82¢ | 域名 & 网站托管 | 仅新客 |
| [Network Solutions](https://www.networksolutions.com/) | Hosting | 9,807 | 0.82¢ | 域名 & 网站托管 | 仅新客 |
| [Network Solutions](https://www.networksolutions.com/) | eCommerce Website Builder | 9,807 | 0.82¢ | 域名 & 网站托管 | 仅新客 |
| [Jobber](https://www.getjobber.com) | Grow Annual | 17,307 | 0.87¢ | 现场服务管理软件 |  |
| [AT&T Business](https://www.att.com/smallbusiness/) | New Internet Plans | 13,076 | 1.15¢ | 企业通信/网络服务 |  |
| [HughesNet](https://www.hughesnet.com/cj-program) | Online Purchase | 8,653 | 1.16¢ | 卫星宽带网络 |  |
| [Verizon Business](https://www.verizon.com/business/) | Service Activations | 16,346 | 1.22¢ | 企业通信/网络服务 |  |
| [TopResume](https://topresume.com) | e1be224f-59ed-4d4d-a334-5580e3f865c7 - 36406: Online Sale - ITEM_SKU IS TfXhszi | 17,307 | 1.44¢ | 简历代写服务 |  |
| [TopResume](https://topresume.com) | c4c61567-8097-47c4-9ea1-85edfd07c696 - 36406: Online Sale - ITEM_SKU IS qWBrksU | 17,307 | 1.44¢ | 简历代写服务 |  |
| [TopResume](https://topresume.com) | 758af815-3d4f-45f0-ab57-253534cc29e8 - 36406: Online Sale - ITEM_SKU IS CeNSXMV | 17,307 | 1.44¢ | 简历代写服务 |  |
| [Verizon Business](https://www.verizon.com/business/) | Wireless Purchases | 13,076 | 1.53¢ | 企业通信/网络服务 |  |
| [Network Solutions](https://www.networksolutions.com/) | SSL Certificates | 4,903 | 1.63¢ | 域名 & 网站托管 | 仅新客 |
| [Jobber](https://www.getjobber.com) | Connect Annual | 8,653 | 1.73¢ | 现场服务管理软件 |  |
| [eReleases](https://www.ereleases.com/) | New Customers | 22,819 | 1.75¢ | 新闻稿发布服务 | 仅新客 |
